## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Add a new repository entry
- [ ] Update an existing repository entry
- [ ] Update JSON catalogue data
- [ ] Update documentation or templates
- [ ] Other maintenance work

## Affected Areas

- [ ] Category Markdown files
- [ ] `data/repositories.json`
- [ ] `data/repositories.schema.json`
- [ ] Contribution docs or templates
- [ ] Other files

## Submission Checklist

- [ ] I followed `docs/repository-entry-format.md`.
- [ ] I used canonical category slugs and allowed status values.
- [ ] I used one primary category and, if needed, secondary categories instead of duplicating the same repository entry across category files.
- [ ] I explained the Madagascar relevance clearly.
- [ ] I avoided promotional language.
- [ ] I marked unknown or unverifiable information explicitly instead of guessing.
- [ ] I updated `data/repositories.json` if the pull request adds or changes a listed repository.
- [ ] I checked for duplicate repository entries.

## Additional Notes

Add any context reviewers should know.
